title: README operator quickstart NM-5 domain pack loading summary
problem: Tickets 113–122 completed NM-5 domain pack runtime loading and claim_validator wiring, but README operator quickstart does not document which pack files are loaded or how domain/overlap labels are validated.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart lists all creativity pack YAML files loaded at runtime.
README documents overlap-domain claim labels and claim_validator allowlist behavior.
No code or test changes beyond README and agent report.
Golden tests and full pytest remain green.
non_goals: No new pack files or loader code changes.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No schema migrations or live Ollama changes.
